recommendations.title: Man's Best Friend
recommendations.overview: A genetic research facility worker exposes animal abuses there to a local TV reporter, who frees and takes in a genetically altered dog from the lab, unaware that he has a violent streak.

recommendations.title: Eden
recommendations.overview: A group of disillusioned outsiders abandon modern society in search of a new beginning. Settling on a remote, uninhabited island, their utopian dream quickly unravels as they discover that the greatest threat isn’t the brutal climate or deadly wildli

recommendations.title: The Cat o' Nine Tails
recommendations.overview: A newsman works with a blind puzzle-solver to uncover a deadly conspiracy linked to a genetic research facility.

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: F/X
recommendations.overview: A movies special effects man is hired by a government agency to help stage the assassination of a well known gangster. When the agency double cross him, he uses his special effects to trap the gangster and the corrupt agents.

recommendations.title: Quatermass and the Pit
recommendations.overview: A mysterious artifact unearthed below a London Underground station proves to have powerful psychic effects on the people around.

recommendations.title: Forbidden World
recommendations.overview: In the distant future, a federation marshal arrives at a research lab on a remote planet where a genetic experiment has gotten loose and begins feeding on the dwindling scientific group.

recommendations.title: COVID-21: Lethal Virus
recommendations.overview: The climate change has released an ancient rabies virus trapped in the Antarctica ice. A female scientist tries to get to the laboratory to create a cure to save the world, protected by an eccentric and two members of the special forces.

recommendations.title: Ice Sharks
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Adventure, Action, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: A new breed of aggressive, ravenous sharks cracks the frozen ocean floor of an Arctic research station, devouring all who fall through. As the station sinks into frigid waters, those alive must fashion makeshift weapons or suffer the same fate.

recommendations.title: Mute Witness
recommendations.overview: When a mute makeup/special effects artist working on a low-budget slasher film gets locked in a dilapidated Moscow movie studio late one night, she thinks she witnesses the making of a snuff film. Thus begins a night of terror.
